body_txt: Regular bullies (mostly the Jerk Jock types) are bad enough. They steal your lunch money, shove you into lockers, and generally do everything they can to inflict Bully Brutality on anyone smaller or weaker than them. But at least there's certain prerequisites to being The Bully ; they've got to be big enough and strong enough (as well as popular enough) to put the hurt on people. Otherwise, how could they? Well, this character figured it out. Have an embarrassing diary on your computer? The Nerdy Bully will hack into it. And email it to all your friends. Bomb a test? This guy'll let you know how dumb you are. At length. And with Cyberbullying , he'll make sure the rest of the internet knows it too. And heaven forbid you have an IT problem in his presence — the sheer weight of his mockery might drive you mad. Or at least to transferring schools. The Nerdy Bully is what happens when a nerd uses his talents to act with typical bullying characteristics, abusing his power, skills, and knowledge to make life hellish for others. They tend to show up in works centered at institutions that are nerdy to begin with, such as schools that specialize in math and science, and they also sometimes have an aggressively atheist or antitheist bent. Their favorite targets are often Book Dumb characters, the Naïve Newcomer who has yet to grasp their "nerd culture", and God save the The Ditz if they are that pathetically dumb enough to be manipulated and outsmarted by them. Rarely, they might choose a high-risk target like a naive Lovable Jock though this very frequently backfires , or if it doesn't they love to play the victim especially in a school setting where stereotypical muscle jocks still exist. If caught, you can expect a flustered insistence that he can't possibly be a bully because he's just a nerd...no matter how obvious his abusive behavior is to the others in the room (which one of them may have recorded in some way ). They can double as Internet Jerk due to their sheer knowledge on internet and other online devices. If he was a victim of bullying himself (in which case compare He Who Fights Monsters ), he might invoke Who's Laughing Now? . More often than not, they're the Insufferable Genius or a Bitch in Sheep's Clothing . May grow up to be The Cracker or even a Tech Bro . Compare to Academic Alpha Bitch , who's unpleasant but generally more goal-oriented and rule-abiding; Evil Nerd , who is unpleasant and goal-oriented, but definitely not rule-abiding; and Even Nerds Have Standards , which they find other nerds more pathetic. The Proud Scholar Race and especially the Plunderers of Knowledge are often ruled by Nerdy Bullies. Characters who subscribe to Academia Elitism are sometimes Nerdy Bullies. Contrast Lovable Jock , a benevolent athlete as opposed to a malevolent geek. Also contrast Abhorrent Alpha Male , who are malevolent manly men .
